{{Infobox concept
| name = pure madra
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[pure madra Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Pure [[madra]] is the fundamental, unformed essence of the [[soul]] and serves as the foundational material for all other types of [[madra]]. It is characterized by its lack of specific [[aspects]], appearing as a colorless or blue-white energy that acts with extreme fluidity and adaptability. Because it lacks specialized properties like fire or [[water]], it is considered weak in terms of physical interaction; it cannot influence the material world or defend against physical objects like arrows. However, it is unparalleled in its ability to affect the [[spirit]] and [[soul]] directly. It can be used to cleanse spiritual impurities, nourish [[madra channels]], and stabilize or purify other forms of energy. In combat and spiritual manipulation, pure [[madra]] is highly effective for attacking or defending the [[spirit]], as it can slip through defenses to influence a target's core directly. It is also used in soulsmithing and the creation of [[constructs]] due to its universal compatibility, though using it can dilute the potency of specialized [[aspects]], much like adding [[water]] to wine. While most practitioners strengthen themselves by harvesting environmental [[aura]] to add specific [[aspects]] to their power, those who maintain pure [[madra]] face greater difficulty in growing stronger and defending themselves physically. Despite these limitations, it remains a vital component for refining energy and managing the complexities of spiritual [[advancement]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] can activate [[scripts]] and shake the [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is compatible with everything but is weak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is rare and has many advantages and disadvantages.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is used to cleanse the [[spirit]] of [[Blackflame]] corrosion.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] was [[cycling]] [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is second to none for attacking and defending the [[spirit]], but it cannot interact with the physical world.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] can be used to repair a core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] can ripple through a person's [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] cycles [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is easier on the channels than [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c5">''Ghostwater'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is difficult to detect by nature.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] pushes [[pure madra]] through his channels.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is lighter, more delicate, and more adaptable than other [[aspects of madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is the foundation for all other [[aspects of madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A mass of [[pure madra]] can hover in the sky.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] ran [[pure madra]] through the [[script-circle]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] as a backup to [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A presence of [[pure madra]] was poised outside [[Lindon]]'s tent.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is almost colorless with a tinge of blue-white.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]]'s section of the box contained [[scales]] of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] was attempting to fight using only his [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can use [[pure madra]] to boost the performance of a [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]] released a detonation of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] can wipe away [[fire madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] to direct the spiritual power.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] to wash out the [[madra]] in [[Daji's armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] streamed into [[Lindon]]'s [[spirit]] during the power drain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[pure madra]] is naturally subtle.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can give off a domineering impression with [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]] feels like a cleansing tide due to his bond with [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] can emit a pulse of [[pure madra]] as a signal.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] gathers [[pure madra]] in his finger.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] blasted down and speared the [[Jade]] through the [[soul]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] to fuel the [[fortress]] [[scripts]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can run [[pure madra]] through the openings of the [[Tomb Hydra's binding]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s channels are filled with [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] is used in [[Soulsmithing]] for its universal compatibility and ability to purify.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a protective field of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] used [[pure madra]] to create temporary bypasses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s [[Empty Palm]] is a strike of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] destroyed a security [[construct]] with [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used a pulse of [[pure madra]] to activate the [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] possesses the emptiness of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[pure madra{{!}}Pure madra]] can be used to soothe chaos in a [[soul]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A column of liquid blue-[[white power]] in the center of the cave was [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] needed [[pure madra]] or [[Shadow{{!}}shadow]] to fight spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can send soothing [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used [[pure madra]] to [[construct]] his meeting-space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]] gathers [[pure madra]] in his palm.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Channels…core, need…repaired. Expensive…elixir. Then…pure madra…for core.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
